accept_when: the request is about security-reviewing one skill or a skill library
the request explicitly mentions privacy theft, credential leakage, exfiltration, hidden behavior, or unsafe execution inside skills
the user wants a visual security report for skills
reject_when: the request is about cleanup, usage analytics, or stale skills with no security audit need
the request is about generic application security rather than skill packages
the request is about creating a new skill instead of auditing one
